raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ja lahds Praueets /
jeb Preesteris/ jeb Laudis buhs/
tas faZZihs: Ta KUNGA Na-
sta/ to paſchu Wihrn peemekle-
chu es/ un winna Namnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta buhs juus faZZiht ik-
katrs us fawn Tuwaku / un ik-
katrs us fawn Brahti: Ko irr
tas KUNGS atbildejs? Un ko
irr tas KUNGS runnajs?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ta KUNGA Nastu
ne buhs juus wairs peeminnecht/
jo ikkatram buhs faws Wahrds
par Nastu/ tapehz ka juhs pahr-
grebsat ta dfihwa Deewa Wahr-
dus/ta KUNGA Zebaot muhfo
Deewa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta buhs tew uhs to Bra-
weeta faZZiht: Ko irr tew tas
KUNGS atbildejs? un ko irr
tas KUNGS runnajs?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tapehz ka juhs faZZ-
kat/ ta KUNGA Nasta/ tad faZZ-
ka tas KUNGS ta: Tapehz ka
juhs scho Wahrdn tacket ta
KUNGA Nasta; kur es tomehr
pee juus efuu juhtijs un faZZijs:
Jums ne buhs faZZiht ta KUNga
Nasta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht raugi / ir es grib-
bu juhs wiſſai aiſmirſt/ un at-
nettifchu juhs no mannin nohſt/
ar to Pilſfahtu/ ko es juus un
juhſeim Tehweem efuu dewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 40,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es zelſchu pahr junts
weenu muhſchigu Raunu / un
muhſchigu Deewafchann/ kas ne
taps aiſmirſta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jeremijus redsdiwi Kurwjus : 1. Ka wee
ar fohti labbahm Wihgchm / tas ohtre
fohti nelabbahm Wihgchm pildihts irr:
Ar teem woſihme wiſch/ kas ar Jekoni-
labbis prahtis Zeetuma aisgahinfchi / te-
buhs atkat atpeſiteem tapſ : 4. Bet Zede-
ins ar teem atlikkufcheem Laudiu tapſ
lahſtu/ un ees bohja/ laid tee buht kur bu-
dami : 8.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "As KUNGS rahdi
man/ un raugi/ tur bi-
diwi Wihgcs-Kurm
preekſch ta KUNGA Namn
likti/ pehz kad NebukadReza-
tas Rehninsch no Babeles b-
aisweddiz Jekoniju / Jojakim-
Dehlu/ to Rehninu no Juhy-
lihds ar teem Leeleem-Kungee
yo Juha/ un tohs Remu-
schus/ un tohs Kallejus no Jer-
salemes/ un bij tohs uhs Bab-
weddiz.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Weena Kurwi bija to-
labbas Wihgcs/ ka tahs pirn-
cenahknſchaſ Wihgcs irr.
ohtrā Kurwi bija fohti nelabb-
Wihgcs / ko fawa Nelabbun-
deht ne warreja ehſt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS faZZi-
us man: Ko redsi tu Jerem-
ius ? Un es faZZiju: Wihg-
Tahs labbas Wihgcs irr to-
labbas/ un tahs nelabbas Wi-
ges irr fohti nelabbas / ko
Nelabbuna deht ne warre ehſt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad notikke ta KUNG-
Wahrds uhs manni/ un faZZi-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta faſſa tas KUNG-
tas Ifraēta Deews: Jtt
ſchahs Wihgcs labbas/ ta paſ-
ſchu es par labbu tohs Aiswest
"
    }
  ],

  "notes": ""
}
